name: MiraeAsset EnergyChem. Core5 ET
summary: MiraeAsset EnergyChem. Core5 ET is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) managed by Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd, focusing on tracking the performance of a basket of five core companies in the South Korean energy and chemical sectors. The ETN provides investors with exposure to the leading companies in the South Korean energy and chemical sectors. It is listed on the Korea Exchange.
